urls.title: LinkedIn Search URLs
urls.description: Paste one or more LinkedIn Job Search URLs here.

count.title: Max Items
count.description: Number of jobs to scrape per search URL.

scrapeCompany.title: Scrape Company Details
scrapeCompany.description: If enabled, extracts full company descriptions and employee counts.

splitByLocation.title: Split by Location
splitByLocation.description: Enable this to bypass the 1000-job LinkedIn limit by splitting searches into smaller areas.
